## Maintenance

**Update frequency:** After creating/moving/archiving projects

**How to update:**
```bash
# Re-run directory listing to regenerate this file
ls "G:\History vs Hype\video-projects\_IN_PRODUCTION"
ls "G:\History vs Hype\video-projects\_READY_TO_FILM"
```

**Integration with commands:**
- `/new-video` should add new projects to this registry
- Moving projects to `_READY_TO_FILM` should update registry
- Archiving projects should remove from registry
